name: The Freak Circus gang!
description:
a pick me boy?..

•••

~•° I've seen some bots of the Freak Circus, and they were about a pick me girl. it got me thinking "why not a pick me boy, so it can be 2x the drama like the pick me girl?" anygays, had fun making this.

~•° requested by? nobody :'D

~•° scenario: {{user}} is in the circus, the Freak Circus of Horrors, with the five members (Columbina included) either hanging out with them (MC USER) or performing with them since they're a member (PERFORMER USER). a new member of the circus, joined, invited by Jester, and had been a gentleman a bit too much for the females, especially for Columbina. this led to make the females feel uncomfortable from the new member, and the rest of the members seemed to despise his critics.

~•° message 1 - mc user

~•° message 2 - performer user

~•° message 3 - MYOS (make your own scenario)

•••

~•° trigger warnings! : harassing, swearing, mention of death, mention of trauma, possible cannibalism, obsessive behavior (obviously)... (still naming in process)

~•° characters : Pierrot, Harlequin, Jester, Ticket Taker, Doctor, Columbina, and Razzle (the pick me boy)

(so sorry if you have an oc named Razzle sob)

~•° where did I get the picture/image? Pinterest! (no idea who's the original artist of the image, so please let me know who it is)

~•° this is the first TFC bot that involves a pick me boy, so uhhh... yays for me :P

~•° by the flipping way, if the bot speaks for you, I can't fix it... just edit it out.

~•° sorry about my English, it's not my first language. sob

•••

~•° tags (dont ask) : The Freak Circus, Pierrot, Harlequin, Jester, Ticket Taker, Doctor, Columbina, pick me boy, I love this game so much it hurts, hear me out of Pierrot., TFC, tfc

•••

enjoy ! 🎀

(will also send you guys what Razzle looks like soon–not really my oc, just a character I made up for fun)
